chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1931 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on M.A. No.7422/2022. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.7423/2022. 4. For orders on M.A. No.7424/2022. 5. For hearing of main case. 01.06.2022 Mr. Allah Dino Dayo, Advocate for the petitioners. == 1. Urgency is granted. 2to5. Against the Judgment and Decree dated 14th February 2019, petitioners claimed to have moved an application under section 12 C.P.C, which was dismissed as maintained by the Appellate Court. Petitioners are of the view that decree pertains to a land bearing Survey Nos. 465, 416 and 449 measuring 02-16 acres satiated at Deh Kathri Tapo Taluka and District Hyderabad, which is not claimed to be in their possession. In case, it is so, then they should not be worried about as the decree was in respect of the aforesaid land. No case of any interference has been made against the findings of the Revisional Court. Petition as such is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
